mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL indicates accelerating inflation expectations, which forces equity valuations to contract as discount rates rise, generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or positive returns dominate in >65% of rising CPI periods over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in UNRATE exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals a sudden labor market deterioration that triggers immediate risk-off positioning and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >60% of triggered months or the signal shows no statistical edge over a random baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in RSAFS and HOUST indicates robust consumer spending and housing market strength, which compounds corporate revenue growth and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in >55% of cases or interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side contraction that outweighs demand, causing earnings downgrades and negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal produces positive returns in >60% of tightening periods or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in PAYEMS reflects expanding employment that supports consumer income and corporate earnings, generating positive short-term market momentum.
failure_condition: Positive PAYEMS revisions correlate with negative 5-day forward returns in >58% of observations over a 3-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in FEDFUNDS below 0.25% signals a zero lower bound trap that compresses yield curve spreads and reduces equity risk premiums, leading to negative quarterly returns.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in >65% of sub-0.25% periods or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDPC1 and falling CPIAUCSL indicates real economic expansion without inflationary pressure, creating an optimal environment for equity valuation multiples to expand.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth > 2% annualized and CPIAUCSL growth < 2% annualized
failure_condition: The divergence signal yields negative returns in >60% of cases or interaction coefficient becomes statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in INDPRO during a post-shock recovery phase indicate lingering supply chain bottlenecks that delay earnings rebounds and suppress short-term equity prices.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns in >55% of triggered instances or loses predictive power outside the specified recovery regime.
